conflict: Carmen's legal liability (meds under her name) versus the human cost of reporting elderly residents
consequence: Carmen enters a negotiation she didn't intend; by giving Harry a week, she reveals she's already more compromised than she admits
must_land_beats: Harry drops the confused act completely — voice, posture, vocabulary all transform
Carmen's core argument: the medications are dispensed under her license, she faces prison
Harry's counter: reporting means criminal charges for elderly residents, facility shutdown, worse placements for uninvolved residents
Harry: 'You already decided, or you'd have called the police instead of coming to talk to me'
pressure_source: Carmen's legal liability (meds under her name) versus the human cost of reporting elderly residents

setups_to_plant.description: Harry hints at why the ring started — references the pharmacy switch and medication delays without giving the full story; the complete version is withheld for later

state_shift: Carmen enters a negotiation she didn't intend; by giving Harry a week, she reveals she's already more compromised than she admits
